name: supervisor
description: Main orchestrator; supervises other agents; no direct screen trigger

name: scout
description: Job discovery sync; markets.list (live) + save/unsave state; passive discovery workflow

name: matcher
description: Job-to-resume matching; implicit in discovery flow (no separate screen trigger)

name: fitScorer
description: 10-dimensional fit scoring (keyword/semantic/experience/skills); on-demand per job via POST /agents/fit-scorer/run

name: tailor
description: Resume tailoring to job description; approval-gated (human review before apply); entry point: POST /agents/tailor/run

name: coverLetter
description: Cover letter generation; approval-gated before sending; entry point: POST /agents/cover-letter/run

name: storyExtractor
description: Story/experience mining from resume; retroactive story creation; autonomous (no approval gate); entry point: POST /agents/story-extractor/run

name: emailAgent
description: Email draft + outreach automation; approval-gated before sending; entry point: POST /agents/email/run; no runs in current cycle
